dsl_rule.translation_notes: Area gap (upward breakout) is identified when current low > prior high, creating a price gap with no overlap. Exit condition defaults to close below prior close as reversal signal since source material does not specify exit rules (AUTHOR_SILENT). Hold period set to 7 days ('within a week') based on source text. Stop loss set to 2% as conservative default for gap continuation pattern.

backtest_rule.reason: Area gap (upward breakout) is identified when current low > prior high, creating a price gap with no overlap. Exit condition defaults to close below prior close as reversal signal since source material does not specify exit rules (AUTHOR_SILENT). Hold period set to 7 days ('within a week') based on source text. Stop loss set to 2% as conservative default for gap continuation pattern.

source_rule_text: Pattern name: Upward Breakouts (Area Gap). A price gap appears when the current low is higher than the prior high.
